mapper.insert: insert into submissions (user_id, problem_id, language, code_content, judge_status, submitted_at) values (#{userId}, #{problemId}, #{language}, #{codeContent}, #{judgeStatus}, now())
mapper.select: select id, user_id, problem_id, language, code_content, judge_status, compile_log, run_time_ms, memory_kb, passed_case_count, total_case_count, judge_trace_id, submitted_at, judged_at from submissions where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update submissions set judge_status = 'JUDGING' where id = #{id} and judge_status = 'PENDING'

update submissions set judge_status = #{judgeStatus}, compile_log = #{compileLog}, run_time_ms = #{runTimeMs}, memory_kb = #{memoryKb}, passed_case_count = #{passedCaseCount}, total_case_count = #{totalCaseCount}, judge_trace_id = #{judgeTraceId}, judged_at = now() where id = #{id} and judge_status in ('PENDING', 'JUDGING')
mapper.select:
select s.id, s.problem_id as problemId, p.title as problemTitle, s.language, s.judge_status as judgeStatus, s.run_time_ms as runTimeMs, s.memory_kb as memoryKb, s.passed_case_count as passedCaseCount, s.total_case_count as totalCaseCount, s.submitted_at as submittedAt, s.judged_at as judgedAt from submissions s join problems p on p.id = s.problem_id
order by s.submitted_at desc, s.id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
